generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our reliance on foreign tech puts our national security at risk. We can't afford to wait for another crisis to act. Strategic autonomy isn't just about independence—it's about ensuring our allies and our own citizens are protected. The cost of inaction is far greater than the investment in securing our own supply chains. #NationalSecurityFirst
